capabilities: Combine abductive reasoning and software architecture knowledge bases by aligning shared workflows and validating merged outputs for consistency and accuracy.

procedure.action: Reconcile artifacts from abductive reasoning and software architecture knowledge bases using domain-specific tools; ensure all key fields are aligned and log discrepancies to merge_log by applying field-level structural comparison on shared key fields; flag conflicts where hash(A.field) != hash(B.field) and log to conflict_log; assert merge_error_count < 1.

Assert the merged output by running JSON Schema draft-07 validation on all records; log validation errors with field paths to validation_log by asserting all required fields conform to the schema definition; emit VALIDATION_FAILED with field path on the first failing field; assert field_validation_pass_rate >= 1.0.
Filter candidate insights by applying pattern matching algorithms on merged data; assert that error_count < 1 and log results to candidate_log.
Assign results using machine learning classifiers trained on domain-specific datasets; ensure classification accuracy > 95% and log misclassifications to classification_log.
Log operation_duration_ms and result_code for each step to audit trail; ensure operation_duration_ms < 500ms for each step to maintain performance.

summary: Integrate abductive reasoning insights with software architecture knowledge bases by merging workflows and validating outputs to ensure consistency and accuracy.
title: Abductive Reasoning Knowledge Base Composition

failureConditions: Inconsistent data when merge omits NULL handling: records with NULL key fields are silently dropped, causing referential integrity violations in downstream consumers.
Validation errors when schema mismatches occur, causing incorrect data to propagate through the system.
Performance degradation when operation_duration_ms exceeds 500ms, leading to timeouts and user dissatisfaction.
metrics: the merged output by running JSON Schema draft-07 validation on all records
that error_count < 1 and log results to candidate_log
JSON Schema draft-07 validation passes for all records
successConditions: assert JSON Schema draft-07 validation passes for all records; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
